name: Google Reviews
description: Query locally cached Google Reviews — ratings, summaries, unanswered reviews. Requires review-batch workflow for data import.

credentials_required.label: Google Places API Key
credentials_required.hint: From Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials

tools.name: query_reviews
tools.description: Search reviews by business name, rating range, or time period

tools.name: review_summary
tools.description: Aggregate review stats: totals, average rating, unanswered count

author: freddy-schuetz
